name: ALEX K. LEE
title: Industrial Engineer · Operations Researcher
bio: B.S. Industrial Engineering student at Purdue University with minors in Statistics and Management. Focused on operations research, stochastic modeling, and simulation — building systems that make better decisions under uncertainty. Holds certificates in Semiconductors & Microelectronics and Data Science Applications.

education.coursework: Stochastic Models in IE, Simulation Modeling & Analysis, Statistical Quality Control, Production Systems, Operations Research, Probability & Statistics for Engineers, Data Analytics, Linear Algebra

entries.title: Student Developer (Operations Research)
entries.org: Boiler Optimizer — Official Senior Design Project, Purdue University
entries.desc: Designed a custom Mixed-Integer Programming model for academic planning with constraints on prerequisites, time conflicts, and degree audit rules to generate optimized multi-semester schedules. Secured faculty sponsorship and led the transition into an official Senior Design Project with defined deliverables and validation milestones. Built a multi-criteria decision chatbot with LLM integration to recommend majors or concentrations within Purdue Engineering.

entries.title: Undergraduate Researcher (Promoted to Hourly-Funded)
entries.desc: Built Fountain of Tech, a website optimized for older adults focused on autonomous vehicles, and deployed SHanCE, an AV assessment survey capturing responses from 50+ participants for factor analysis. Conducting a literature review and developing a research proposal on using AI and VR simulation to improve AV accessibility for people with disabilities.

entries.title: Systems Validation Engineer
entries.org: Flanders Electric, Carmel, IN (Intern Jun–Aug 2025; Part-time thereafter)
entries.desc: Standardized validation procedures with repeatable workflows and traceability across test environments. Increased test coverage 30% and cut debug cycle time 4 hours per sprint. Built and maintained 80+ automated regression tests across SQL and containerized environments. Designed a simulation-based validation system using hardware I/O emulation (LabJack, RPi) to replicate PLC signals, eliminating the need for expensive physical test setups.

entries.title: Undergraduate Research Assistant
entries.desc: Developed a dispatch and scheduling algorithm for simulated OHT fleets in AMHS-style semiconductor fab environments, comparing utilization and flow metrics. Applied stochastic modeling to evaluate throughput under uncertainty, identifying bottleneck stages in wafer-lot material movement and proposing strategies.

entries.title: Industrial Engineering Mentor
entries.desc: Mentored 16 undergraduates on curriculum planning and internship guidance; 12 have secured placements so far.

entries.title: Computer Science Instructor
entries.desc: Taught fundamental programming concepts to 32 students, with a focus on coding projects to improve creativity and attentiveness.

projects.name: Boiler Optimizer
projects.desc: MIP-based academic planner that generates optimized multi-semester schedules respecting prerequisites, time conflicts, and degree audit rules. Includes an LLM-powered chatbot for major/concentration recommendations.

projects.name: StatWorkbench
projects.desc: Analysis workflow that ingests CSV data and generates diagnostic visualizations (QQ plots, residual plots, leverage analysis). Implements Multiple Linear and Ridge Regression pipelines with side-by-side comparison via RMSE and adjusted R-squared.

projects.name: MarkovSim
projects.desc: Simulation pitting human judgment against an MCDM model to demonstrate continuous Markov Chains through a simple game. Models state transitions to evaluate strategy evolution under uncertainty.

projects.name: alexklee.com
projects.desc: Dual-mode portfolio site with AMHS background simulation, Monte Carlo slime generator, and collectibles inventory.
